citRespParty.rpOrgName: South Sudan Information Management Working Group (IMWG)

dataIdInfo.idAbs: The dataset represents the payams of South Sudan

Consts.useLimit: See the COD/FOD Registry Terms of Use. This does not replace any terms of use information provided with the dataset.

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Administrative level 3 boundaries of South Sudan

dataLineage.statement:
Layer was downloaded as a shapefile by ITOS from HDX. It was then analyzed by ITOS for errors. Those errors were corrected and the layer was sent back to UNOCHA as a feature class within a file geodatabase.
The following errors were found and fixed by ITOS: 1. Multipart sliver removed from "Gangura" 2. Fixed 32 gap errors and 18 overlap errors 3. Some spacing errors in Admin3 names with numbers have been fixed. 4. The "Namutina" [SS100902] ADM3 feature was moved from the "Tambura' [SS1009] ADM2 feature to the "Nagero" [SS1007] ADM2 feature.
NOTE: Because the Abyei Region is included in this layer, it will not be nested with Admin0 and 1

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The creation date of the dataset. If unknown, the date the dataset was received.
The date the candidate or service was created.
This will be populated if you are archiving this data and replacing it with another set. It will be blank for initial deployments.
